name: Swing Kick
original_name: ยกนี้พี่ต้องชนะ
overview: A popular Muay Thai boxer is drugged before a fight and sees his career ruined. While drinking heavily, he meets a young man, with whom he has a one-night stand, only to discover that he is the new mentor at his boxing gym. As their paths intertwine, they begin a romance.

trailers.title: [ENG SUB] Official Pilot | Swing Kick (ยกนี้พี่ต้องชนะ)
